_meta.description: Configuration centralisee des sites — Jarvis One / Groupe Genevoise

Hugo Schaller.style: Expert medical et financier. Ton direct et technique. Public: medecins FMH, RC Pro, FINMA, Tardoc.

Amelie Bonvin.style: Accessible, pedagogique. Public: infirmiers, pharmaciens, paramedicaux.

Marc Favre.style: Technique, direct. Optimisation fiscale, restructuration, finance.

Elodie Rochat.style: Pedagogique. Articles premiere fois: creer SA, TVA.

medcourtage.ch.label: MedCourtage

siteContext.ton: Expert, technique, ancrage FINMA et FMH. Direct, factuel, chiffres precis.

siteContext.exemples_articles: RC Pro medecin, prevoyance LPP professions medicales, assurance perte de gain, Tardoc vs Tarmed

imageStyle.palette_dominante: blanc clinique, bleu marine, or discret, gris anthracite
imageStyle.sujets_types: equipements medicaux, bureaux cabinet, documents assurance, espaces cliniques
imageStyle.imperfections_types: reflets inox, neons verdatres, documents annotes, stylo pose

exhibitStyle.geminiDirective: Swiss medical insurance consulting report. Clinical precision, navy blue (#2c5f7c) accents on pure white, subtle linen paper texture. Typography: clean sans-serif, generous spacing. Aesthetic: between a FMH medical journal and a FINMA regulatory document. Professional, factual, zero decoration.

exhibitStyle.geminiDirective: Geneva private banking and fiduciary document. Dark anthracite (#1a1a2e) headers with bronze-gold (#c9a84c) accent lines on ivory white. Subtle laid paper texture. Typography: tight, structured, ledger-like precision. Aesthetic: a page from a Swiss private bank annual report. Authoritative, discreet, old-money restraint.

exhibitStyle.geminiDirective: Vaud cantonal fiduciary advisory document. Dark anthracite (#1a1a2e) with warm bronze (#c9a84c) accents on off-white. Subtle cotton paper grain. Typography: methodical, orderly, Swiss-German accounting precision. Aesthetic: cantonal tax administration report meets boutique advisory firm. Structured, no-nonsense, trustworthy.

exhibitStyle.geminiDirective: International relocation guide for Geneva expatriates. Sage green (#3a7d6e) accents on warm white, subtle recycled paper texture. Typography: approachable sans-serif, open spacing, bilingual feel. Aesthetic: a welcome booklet from a premium relocation concierge. Warm, practical, internationally sophisticated.
